title: CRM People Browser UI
summary: Added an authenticated, searchable People/CRM browser backed by the existing Maraithon.Crm context.
next_action: Use the People page to inspect CRM data; future work can add person detail, edit, and merge flows.

verification.notes: Focused People LiveView tests passed. mix precommit passed with 1868 tests, 0 failures.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented and verified the CRM People browser UI.
resume_context.notes: The page is read-only by design for this pass. It lists active CRM people and searches through Maraithon.Crm.list_people/2.

history.note: Initial spec created and moved directly into implementation.
Implemented the People LiveView, route, sidebar navigation, focused tests, and passed mix precommit.
